data.title: Dogecoin Price Eyes $0.30 Breakout After Key Trendline Defends Again
data.description:
Dogecoin price is trading above a long-term ascending trendline that has been in place since October 2024. The trendline had acted as a support level in the past several times when markets have corrected. On the weekly chart, the current activity is consolidating upwards along this line confirming that the buyers are consolidating at this […] The post Dogecoin Price Eyes $0
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/05/09/dogecoin-price-eyes-0-30-breakout-after-key-trendline-defends-again/

data.title: BitMart completes ETH L2 network hard fork upgrade, deposits and withdrawals have been restored
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News BitMart successfully completed the ETH L2 mainnet hard fork upgrade at 00:15 (UTC+8) on May 10, 2025, and has now fully restored the recharge and withdrawal services of the ETH L2 mainnet and its related tokens OP-ETH (and its tokens), BASE-ETH (and its tokens), MINT-ETH, MODE-ETH, SONEIUM-ETH and UNICHAIN-ETH.

data.title: Bitcoin Spot ETF in the U.S. Reaches Record Net Inflow
data.description: According to BlockBeats, as of May 8, monitoring by Farside Investors indicates that the U.S. Bitcoin spot ETF has achieved a cumulative net inflow of $40.806 billion since its launch, marking a new historical high. The previous peak for total net inflow was recorded on February 7, reaching $40.78 billion.

data.title: BermudAir to accept stablecoin payments for flights by end of 2025
data.description:
BermudAir has announced that it will start accepting payments for flight tickets in stablecoins by the end of 2025. The airline stated that it will do this through a partnership with Zero Hash. According to a press release, the move will make BermudAir the first airline to offer native stablecoin payments for flight tickets through […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/bermudair-to-accept-stablecoin-payments/

data.title: Rumble to Launch Tether-Collab Crypto Wallet in Q3 2025. Here’s Why the Best Wallet Token Could Explode
data.description:
Chris Pavlovski, Rumble’s founder and CEO, took to X to announce the launch of a Bitcoin and stablecoin wallet. As per Chris’s X post, we can expect to see the newest entrant in the Bitcoin wallets space by the third quarter of 2025. The Rumble CEO also mentioned that the wallet would directly compete with Coinbase. Keep reading to learn more about Rumble’s latest crypto adventure
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/rumble-to-launch-tether-collab-crypto-wallet-heres-why-the-best-wallet-token-could-explode/

data.title: Authorities Shut Down eXch Platform in €34M Crypto Seizure
data.description:
TL;DR Germany and the Netherlands took down eXch, seizing €34 million ($38 million) in crypto in the country’s third-largest operation. The plataform had operated since 2014 on both the internet and darknet, facilitating swaps without AML checks and processing around $1. 9 billion. Part of the $1. 5 billion stolen from Bybit in February may have moved. . . 
source: https://crypto-economy.com/authorities-shut-down-exch-platform-in-e34m-crypto-seizure/

data.title: Solana Chain SOL Short Liquidation Volume Exceeds Centralized Exchanges, Reaching $47 Million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to SolanaFloor monitoring, in the past 24 hours, the SOL short liquidation volume of the Solana chain's native perpetual contract exchange reached US$47 million, exceeding the US$31 million liquidation scale of centralized exchanges.

data.title: Coinbase Q1 earnings report falls short of expectations, Wall Street receives mixed reviews after completing $2.9 billion acquisition of Deribit
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Coinbase released its Q1 2025 financial report, with revenue falling 12% month-on-month to $2.03 billion, lower than market expectations, and trading revenue falling nearly 19% year-on-year to $1.3 billion. Weak trading volume in April put pressure on the outlook for the second quarter, and analysts such as JPMorgan Chase and KBW lowered their full-year revenue expectations.
However, Coinbase's acquisition of Deribit, the world's largest crypto derivatives exchange, for $2.9 billion has attracted market attention. Analysts such as Bernstein and Canaccord gave positive comments, believing that this move will enhance Coinbase's strategic position in the derivatives field and help its global layout.
In addition, stablecoin business and service revenue such as custody and trading technology increased by 9% to $698 million, becoming its key growth pillar for hedging market fluctuations. USDC balance surged to $12.3 billion, and the "Coinbase as a service" model is also seen as a potential long-term growth engine. (CoinDesk)
